creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Since three days for now (last update of DDNS entry is Friday, 4th) ddclient (dns/ddclient, most recent version 3.8.2) rejects updating of the privided IP to the dynamic DNS service with the following error message:

[...]
 WARNING:  file /var/tmp/ddclient.cache, line 3: Invalid Value for keyword 'ip' = ''
WARNING:  skipping update of all from <nothing> to xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx.
WARNING:   last updated <never> but last attempt on Tue Jul  8 20:14:11 2014 failed.
WARNING:   Wait at least 5 minutes between update attempts.


regards,
   ddclient@gate.walstatt.dynvpn.de (version 3.8.2)


The operating system is FreeBSD CURRENT:

FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #1 r268416: Tue Jul  8 18:29:05 CEST 2014 amd64

Since Friday, 4th, nothing changed in my setup or environment except the operating system (on that box the OS is updated on a daily basis).
